tasks.description: Perspective comparison view — new page at /w/[workspaceId]/perspectives/compare with two perspective dropdowns, comparison table, divergence highlighting, summary stats, element navigation links, and PDF export
acceptance_criteria: New page at /w/[workspaceId]/perspectives/compare — shows empty state when <2 perspectives with annotations
Two dropdown selectors to pick which perspectives to compare
Table layout: rows = annotated elements (steps/sections/touchpoints/stages), columns = each perspective's annotation text + rating
Divergence highlighting: rows where ratings differ by 2+ points get amber background
Summary stats at top: annotation count per perspective, average rating, divergence count, top 3 most divergent elements
Clicking element name navigates to that element on the correct canvas tab
Export comparison as standalone PDF using jsPDF (title + summary stats + comparison table)
Sidebar nav link added (with Eye or similar icon, positioned after Compare)
workspace-shell.tsx exclusion list updated with 'perspectives' segment
Workflows sidebar active check excludes /perspectives path

similar_files: src/app/(app)/w/[workspaceId]/compare/page.tsx — server page pattern (fetch data, pass to client view)
src/lib/export/comparison-pdf.ts — PDF export pattern with jsPDF
patterns_to_follow: Server page: createClient() → auth check → redirect → fetch perspectives + annotations → pass to client view
Client API: use fetchPerspectives(workspaceId) and fetchAnnotations(perspectiveId) from lib/api/client.ts
Sidebar: add entry to NAV_ITEMS array with {label, icon, href} — use Eye icon from lucide-react
Also update Workflows active check in sidebar.tsx line 37 to exclude /perspectives
workspace-shell.tsx line 47: add 'perspectives' to the exclusion array
DIVERGENCE_THRESHOLD = 2 as named constant (not magic number)
Navigation URLs: /w/{workspaceId}/{tabId} — need tab_id from elements
PDF: jsPDF with autoTable or manual text positioning — match existing comparison-pdf.ts pattern
learnings_relevant: workspace-shell route exclusion list: must add segment name when adding new route dirs (LEARNINGS.md)
apiFetch unwraps envelope — returns T directly, no nested access

tasks.special_instructions: This is purely client-side. No migrations needed. All data comes from existing perspectives + perspective_annotations tables via existing API wrappers. The page should fetch all perspectives for the workspace, let user select 2, then fetch annotations for both, compute comparison table client-side. Divergence = abs(rating_a - rating_b) >= DIVERGENCE_THRESHOLD. 'Top 3 most divergent' = sorted by max absolute rating difference across all annotations for that element. Navigation requires tab_id for each element — server page should fetch steps/sections/stages/touchpoints with their tab_id to build a lookup map. PDF export should use jsPDF (already a dependency) — create a standalone download function, not a separate route.
